name: CONTRACT-BUG-36
title: workspace-structure.json schema 'schemaVersion' (camelCase) but documents it validates use 'schema_version' (snake_case)
description: schemas/workspace-structure.json is itself a JSON Schema. Its own metadata uses camelCase 'schemaVersion' on line 3, but the schema requires documents to use snake_case 'schema_version' (line 12). The schema's metadata convention does not match the convention it enforces. Pick one and use consistently.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
